module.name: card
module.description: An elevated card with a colored title bar and a body, split into exactly two body sections (title, body).
module.aiSpec:
Highlight a titled chunk of content in a raised card with a colored header bar — good for feature callouts, definitions, or grouped notes. For a plain framed screenshot use @browser; for a small inline label use @badge.
Body: exactly two sections split by `<!-- @ -->`: - section 1 = the header title. - section 2 = the card body (ordinary markdown).
Parameters: - color (color, default var(--accent-color)): header-bar background color. - icon (text, default empty): a small emoji/character shown before the title, e.g. an emoji. - align (select: left | center | right, default left): header-title alignment. - shadow (boolean, default true): drop shadow (elevation). - radius (number px, default blank = theme): corner rounding; blank uses the theme's --radius-sm.
Usage: <!-- @card color: #2563eb, icon: 🚀, align: center --> Launch Plan <!-- @ --> Ship the beta by Friday and gather feedback. <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Card
snippet.text: <!-- @card color: var(--accent-color) --> Card Title <!-- @ --> Card body content goes here. <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Card (icon)
snippet.text: <!-- @card color: #2563eb, icon: 🚀 --> Launch Plan <!-- @ --> Ship the beta by Friday. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Card with an emoji icon in the header.
